front.title: AI in Dystopian Futures
front.subtitle: Exploring the role of artificial intelligence in speculative fiction.

back.text:
Artificial intelligence has long been a compelling theme in science fiction, often depicted as a double-edged sword. In dystopian narratives, AI frequently embodies humanity's fears of losing control over technology. From Isaac Asimov's 'I, Robot' to the chilling world of 'The Matrix,' these stories explore the consequences of advanced AI systems that surpass human intelligence, leading to oppressive regimes or existential threats. 

These fictional portrayals serve as cautionary tales, prompting society to reflect on ethical considerations and the potential ramifications of AI development. As we venture further into the era of machine learning and automation, the lessons gleaned from these dystopian futures remain relevant, urging us to navigate the complexities of technology with foresight and responsibility.
